Mar 22, 2019

Doğuş University showed its difference in volleyball too

Doğuş University men’s volleyball team won one more cup for our university. Remaining unbeaten in 2017-2018 season, our team became the champion by eliminating many of its opponents.

Mar 22, 2019

Turkey Inter-University Football Tournament of Champions Announced

The champion of the Intercollegiate Football Tournament organized by Turkish University Sports Federation has been announced. Our team, which plays in the second league, defeated Işık University 2-1 in Şile Stadium exhibiting an exhilarating performance.

Mar 22, 2019

Another Success of Doğuş University at the chess tournament

Our student Özgür Şahin won the first place at the Intercollegiate Turkey Chess Tournament. Remaining unbeaten during the tournament, he was entitled to get the gold medal.

Mar 22, 2019

Our Sailing Team won the championship award in the races

Doğuş University Sailing Team competing in Collegiate Sailing Championship, Marmaris International Yacht Club-Campus Cup, Urla Yatch Club – Universail and Jimmy Key Cup, İstanbul Sailing Club Trophy and BAU Trophy added another achievement to its former ones.

Mar 22, 2019

Doğuş Cooperation On Three Continents

Doğuş University, which is constantly improving with its global education perspective and broad vision, opens new windows to the world.

Doğuş University has become the most successful brand of the year in the education field

“The ONE Awards”, which is one of the most important awards of the world of communication and marketing in the field of integrated marketing, rewards institutions that create the most added value for reputation and brand value during the year based on the data obtained from public opinion.

Mar 22, 2019

Doğuş University Men’s Basketball Team in the first League

Doğuş University, which has built a reputation for its achievements in many branches of sports, makes a name for itself in basketball, too.

Election for Student Representative

Elections that will be held to constitute our university’s student council representatives, faculty and student board have been postponed due to the updates by Higher Education Board (YÖK). Election for student representatives has been postponed to another date that will be announced later on.

Mar 22, 2019

Our university has become a member of Turkey PANDA

Prof. Dr. Kazem Azizi, lecturer in the department of Physics, has become a member of Doğuş University and Turkey PANDA experiment (Anti-Proton Annihilation Darmsdat). PANDA experiment, which has been founded in Darmstad, Germany, GSI Helmholtzzentrum für Schwerionenforschung, aims to be one of the most important experiments in the field of hadron physics worldwide.
